content.en:
The Dark Sea is not a territorial sea, but a huge and boundless Ancient Treasure Land, far from being comparable to ordinary Ancient Treasure Land, and only a top overlord-level force like the Dark Sea is qualified to occupy this place.

After Ye Tian came to the Dark Sea, he came to the Dark Mountain in the depths of the Dark Sea.

The palace of the Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor is here.

Ye Tian came to the palace of the Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor and sat down to chat.

At this time, the Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor said: "Endless Heavenly Ancestor, there are no rules in our Dark Sea, wait a while, I will gather some high-level officials and announce it, you will be regarded as joining the Dark Sea." When the time comes, I will also spread the word to the outside world. "

"Can you publicize it later?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Oh, why?"

Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor asked curiously.

"I'm going to kill the Hitomi Heavenly Ancestor. Ye Tian said coldly.

Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor reminded: "Ye Tian, I suggest that you still don't do this, because the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor has a backstage, and his master is the Ancient Mountain Lord, who has surpassed the existence of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm. If it weren't for the existence of the Ancient Mountain Lord, the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor would have been killed by the Nine Blood Transformation Realm's Ancient Geniuses!"

"Lord of the Ancient Mountains!"

Ye Tian was taken aback.

If he really kills the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor, the Ancient Mountain Lord will be afraid that he will also attack him because of his face!

Even if he hides in the dark sea, he never goes out.

Moreover, his family and the Terrans may not be able to avoid the detection of the Lord of the Ancient Mountains.

"In other words, I want to kill the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor, there is no way?" Ye Tian frowned.

Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor smiled slightly: "It's not impossible, if you can transcend the Blood Transformation Realm a few times, then killing the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor is very simple." Of course, if you wait for the Ancient Mountain Lord to leave, you can also kill the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor. Like those beings who have surpassed the Nine Blood Transformation Realms, they will go to a mysterious place every once in a while, and that is the opportunity to do it. However, once the Lord of Taikoo Mountain returns, it is still easy to be troubled. Therefore, I suggest that you wait for the opportunity. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian nodded.

But he was still thinking about how to deal with the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor in his heart, in short, he didn't believe that there was no way.

It's a big deal, he rebuilt a copy body, cultivated from scratch, and then grew up step by step, and then grew to the eighth blood transformation realm, and then killed the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor.

In this way, even if the Ancient Mountain Lord made a move, he would have to give up the replica body.

It's just a waste of time and resources.

"Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor, the Ancient Bone Technique of the Ancient Golden Tablet can make the Infinite Bone Bone Bone Transformation, this bone transformation should be related to the realm above the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, right?" Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor said: "The realm above the Blood Transformation Realm is called the Bone Transformation Realm, and we need to complete the bone transformation of all the bones of the whole body once, and then we can transform into the Bone Transformation Realm. "

"Even if it's seven Blood Transformation Realms and eight Blood Transformation Realms, you can still cultivate the Ancient Bone Technique, right?" Ye Tian asked again.

Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor nodded, "Yes, it is true that you can cultivate, but you can only increase your strength, and you can't break through to the Bone Transformation Realm." Only after cultivating to reach the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, and then performing a bone transformation of the immeasurable bones of the whole body, can it be regarded as entering the Bone Transformation Realm. In addition, the Ancient Bone Technique is also strong and weak, like the ordinary Taigu Bone Technique, which can only make the ordinary Nine Blood Transformation Realm Infinite Bones bone transformation, it is useless for us Ancient Geniuses. We, the primeval-level geniuses, need the top-notch primordial bone technique to make the immeasurable bone bone-transformed. Therefore, if our primordial-level geniuses want to break through to the Bone Transformation Realm, it is very difficult!"

"The top primeval bone technique!"

Ye Tian finally knew that he had used the Replica Body to cultivate the Ancient Bone Technique before, and although he had strengthened the Infinite Bone, why he hadn't undergone bone transformation, it was because those Ancient Bone Techniques were just ordinary Ancient Bone Techniques.

"Thank you Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor for your advice!"

Ye Tian thanked.

"Hahaha, it's not a point!" Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor said with a smile.

Ye Tian chatted with Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor for a long time before leaving.

Subsequently, the Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor internally announced that the Endless Heavenly Ancestor had joined the Dark Sea, but did not announce it to the outside world.

This is also Ye Tian's request!

From the Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor, Ye Tian also obtained a secret, that is, it was best to cultivate some more primeval techniques after becoming a primordial-level genius of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm.

In this way, it will not affect the impact of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, although it will make the Infinite Bone Bone Bone Harder and the bone transformation difficulty will increase, but the difficulty of the Primeval Genius Bone Transformation is already very large, so it doesn't hurt to increase it a little more.

If you have cultivated a lot of primeval techniques in the Eight Blood Transformation Realm Stages, resulting in the inability to impact the Nine Blood Transformation Realms, it will be a big loss!

Therefore, like Ye Tian, it was rare for the Eight Blood Transformation Realm to master the three primeval techniques.

In the following years, Ye Tian began to comprehend the Taikoo Jinwen.

He had obtained hundreds of thousands of primeval gold inscriptions, so he wanted to comprehend them one by one as soon as possible, and then go on to create the top primeval bone technique.

At the same time, the news of his joining the Dark Sea leaked out.

......

Taikoo Mountain.

The Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor came back, and when he learned that Ye Tian had joined the Dark Sea, he knew that he had no hope of killing the Endless Heavenly Ancestor, and the Dark Sea would definitely keep the Endless Heavenly Ancestor.

So, he's back.

It seems that this matter has passed like this, and the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor also thinks so.

But he didn't expect Ye Tian to think about how to kill him.

Time flies, Ye Tian cultivates in the Dark Sea, and the human race has also returned and is no longer hidden.

As time passed, Ye Tian mastered more and more primeval inscriptions, and it took less time to comprehend each primeval inscription.

One hundred Swire Golden Texts!

Two hundred Taikoo inscriptions!

A thousand primeval inscriptions!

Now, the number of Ancient Golden Scripts he mastered was probably higher than that of the Heavenly Ancestors of the Dark Sword.

"Let's try to create a top-notch primeval bone technique first!"

Ye Tian began to create step by step, failing at first, but he continued to experiment with his own copy body, so he made rapid progress.

Finally, on this day, the first top-notch primeval bone technique was created by him.

This top-notch primeval bone technique was integrated into the immeasurable bone of his right index finger.

Rumble!!!

The immeasurable bone of the index finger of his right hand began to undergo bone transformation, constantly absorbing the energy of the outside world, making his finger more and more powerful, and the power was very terrifying.

After a long time, the bone transformation was completely completed.

Subsequently, he unleashed the Ancient God and Demon Fist and found that his power had increased a lot.

This is just to transform the immeasurable bone of an index finger, if the immeasurable bone of the entire arm is all bone transformed, then how much strength must be improved, it must skyrocket!
